description_long: This is a vintage biplane with a green camouflage paint scheme and roundel insignias on the upper wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The airplane features two sets of straight, parallel wings connected by struts and wires, with a single propeller mounted at the nose. The fuselage is slender and tapers toward the tail, which has a conventional tailplane and a single vertical stabilizer. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a small tailwheel. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be open, suitable for a single pilot. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible control surfaces and structural elements.
description: A green, vintage biplane with dual straight wings, roundel insignias, a single nose propeller, and an open cockpit. The fixed landing gear and classic tail design evoke early military aircraft.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual wings, central propeller, open cockpit, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_1: Oblique side view highlighting the roundel insignia on the upper wing, camouflage pattern, and the tail structure.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, both roundel insignias, and the straight alignment of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite oblique side view emphasizing the tail assembly, wing struts, and the propeller's position.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, parallel wings stacked vertically and connected by struts and wires; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers forming a standard tailplane.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit positioned just behind the propeller, likely single-seat with minimal canopy.
